extra.reason: SvelteKit (TS, strict) scaffolded in /web with Node adapter. Verified: typecheck 0 errors, prettier+eslint clean, 7 unit tests pass, production build succeeds. Config module with fail-fast on missing env + test; .env.example documents CMS_BASE_URL/CMS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS(default 5000)/SESSION_SECRET; base layout lang=da. Per-package lint/prettier config will be unified under mise in sgim-n25.1.

Strapi 5.50.2 (TS strict) scaffolded in /cms. Verified independently: typecheck clean, eslint clean, 13/13 config tests pass; .env gitignored & untracked. Config module src/config/env.ts is the single env reader with fail-fast on 9 required vars; config/{database,server,admin}.ts rewired to it. docker-compose Postgres (dev-only), .env.example, README, scripts (dev/build/start/test/lint/typecheck). build + start booted fully against Postgres. KNOWN ENV LIMIT: 'npm run dev' (vite admin watcher) hits ENOSPC inotify limit in this sandbox; build/start unaffected. NOTE: test runner is Jest; harness (sgim-n25.2) will standardize on Vitest.

Harness baseline delivered. Root mise.toml is THE unified runner: 'mise run check' = lint+typecheck+test across /cms and /web (verified exit 0); plus lint/typecheck/test/format/format-check and check:cms/check:web tasks. Added root .editorconfig. Gave /cms prettier parity (prettier@3, .prettierrc.json, .prettierignore, format/format:check scripts, prettier folded into cms lint); added web format:check. AGENTS.md documents 'mise run check' as the single entry point. DELIBERATE DEVIATIONS: (1) mise orchestrates per-package scripts instead of npm-workspace hoisting — /cms(Strapi CJS) and /web(SvelteKit ESM) are independently deployable with idiomatic toolchains; (2) no shared tsconfig.base — kept each package's ecosystem-idiomatic strict config; (3) shared/custom ESLint rules (boundaries, constitution) intentionally deferred to sgim-n25.3/.4.

Constitution size/complexity + determinism ESLint rules added to both cms/eslint.config.mjs and web/eslint.config.js. Size/complexity as WARNINGS (max-lines 100, max-lines-per-function 60, max-params 4, complexity 10). Determinism WARNINGS via no-restricted-syntax (Date.now(), zero-arg new Date(), Math.random()) + no-restricted-properties (process.env), each with actionable constitution-referencing messages. Config modules exempted from the process.env rule (cms src/config/**, web src/lib/server/config*.ts). Verified by subagent: mise run check exit 0 (warnings non-fatal); one intended pre-existing warning: cms/src/config/env.ts is 112 lines (>100). Only the two eslint configs were touched.

Pre-commit hooks via husky v9 + lint-staged. Root package.json (private, NO workspaces — hosts husky+lint-staged only). .husky/pre-commit runs 'npx lint-staged' with documented --no-verify bypass. lint-staged.config.mjs scopes per package: staged cms/** and web/** files are formatted (prettier --write) + linted (eslint --fix) by cd-ing into the owning package so each package's own flat config is authoritative; data/doc files get prettier only; whole-project typecheck intentionally excluded (stays fast; covered by mise run check/CI). Verified independently: hook config correct, git core.hooksPath=.husky/_, no temp artifacts left, mise run check exit 0. Subagent tested the hook fires on a mis-formatted staged file then cleaned up.

Test runner unified on Vitest + coverage thresholds. /cms migrated Jest->Vitest (removed jest/ts-jest/@types/jest; added vitest+@vitest/coverage-v8; deleted jest.config.js; cms/vitest.config.ts; env.test.ts uses explicit vitest imports; 13/13 pass). /web coverage added to vite.config.ts (7/7 pass). Per-glob v8 thresholds (65/65/65/65) scoped to the dirs with logic+tests today (cms src/config/**, web src/lib/server/** minus thin config.ts), with comments mapping to constitution §2 (domain ~80%, adapters/UI ~60-70%) and naming future globs (src/domain, src/api, src/routes) — no global threshold so sparse scaffolding can't fail the gate. Enforcement proven real (99% threshold -> fail; 65% -> pass). Added 'mise run coverage' task (verified exit 0). Verified independently: cms 13 + web 7 tests pass, coverage exits 0. NOTE: full 'mise run check' currently red due to the CONCURRENT content-type agent's unformatted cms/src/content-types/club/schema.json — not from this task; resolved by 'mise run format'.

Architecture-fitness boundaries via dependency-cruiser@18 (root-scoped; root .dependency-cruiser.cjs + root 'boundaries' script; added typescript@6 at root for depcruise's TS parser). HARD-FAIL rules: no-strapi-vendor-in-web (web/src must not import @strapi/*, except the reserved adapter path web/src/lib/server/cms/**); web-domain-purity + cms-domain-purity (forward-looking: domain dirs must not import framework/adapter/UI); no-circular (error); no-orphans (warn). Each rule carries an actionable, constitution-referencing message. Verified: exit 0 on current tree (3 warn-only orphans, no false positives on the concurrent cms content-type work); proven to catch a real violation (@strapi import in web/src -> error exit 1) and to NOT flag the allowed adapter path. Wired into mise: added [tasks.boundaries] and folded 'boundaries' into [tasks.check].depends (mise run boundaries exit 0). Rules scoped so legitimate Strapi usage in cms/src/api & content-types is allowed.

Self-correcting lint messages ('positive prompt injection'). Audited the custom messages introduced by sgim-n25.4 (ESLint no-restricted-syntax/no-restricted-properties) and sgim-n25.3 (dependency-cruiser rule comments): all already follow the repair-instruction shape — (1) what's wrong, (2) the concrete fix, (3) constitution reference (e.g. 'avoid Date.now() — inject a Clock and call clock.now() instead'; boundary rule: 'move the import behind web/src/lib/server/cms/**'). Documented the convention explicitly as a comment block in BOTH cms/eslint.config.mjs and web/eslint.config.js so future custom rules follow it, cross-referencing the dependency-cruiser config. Verified: web lint passes clean; cms eslint config parses and is prettier-clean. To be echoed in AGENTS.md harness docs (sgim-n25.10).

Dependency & secret scanning (pre-CI parts). gitleaks (mise-managed v8.30): root .gitleaks.toml (default rules + allowlist for .env/.env.*, node_modules, lockfiles, build dirs); pre-commit stage in .husky/pre-commit ('gitleaks git --staged', aborts before lint-staged on a finding); mise task [tasks.secrets] whole-repo tracked scan (verified exit 0). Dependabot via .github/dependabot.yml (weekly npm for /, /cms, /web + github-actions). Verified: allowlist functional (cms/.env=5 findings without config, clean with it); planted AWS key BLOCKED by hook then cleaned up; dependabot YAML valid. REMAINDER (CI npm audit + gitleaks CI job) intentionally deferred to sgim-n25.7 (noted there).

Documented the harness in AGENTS.md (canonical; CLAUDE.md symlink). Added 'The Harness: Guides & Sensors' section: sensor table (gate/command/severity), constitution-rule -> enforcing-sensor mapping, guides (AGENTS.md, constitution, self-correcting messages, mechanical-vs-non-mechanical), and the deferred CI items. Updated the Pre-commit section to note the gitleaks staged scan. Complements the existing 'Running the Checks (mise)' section.
Content type Static Page created as collectionType with fields: title, slug, content, excerpt, featuredImage, SEO fields, navigation visibility/order, parent/children hierarchy
Content type Navigation created as collectionType with fields: title, slug, isPrimary, location, publishedAt, and user relations
Content type Site Settings created as singleType with fields: siteName, siteDescription, logo, favicon, phone, email, address, social URLs, footerText, copyrightText

Content types Event created as collectionType (combining single-day and multi-day) with fields: title, slug, description, eventType enum, dates/times, location, image, organizer, targetAudience, price, registration fields, isFeatured, relation to Club
Content type Club created as collectionType with fields: name, slug, description, images, targetAudience, meeting details, location, contact info, URLs, isActive, relation to Events
Content type Aktuelt created as singleType with fields: enabled, title, subtitle, content, images, CTA fields, start/end dates, textColor

Strapi API client as a generic ContentSource port + Strapi adapter (hexagonal). PORT (pure domain, web/src/lib/domain): ContentSource interface returning domain types via a Result<T,ContentError> (type-based errors, no throwing); distinct ContentError kinds (timeout/network/unavailable/not_found/client/server/mapping); domain types for SiteSettings, Navigation, StaticPage, Club, the two EventItem kinds, Aktuelt; Clock port; pure upcomingFeed merge logic. ADAPTER (web/src/lib/server/cms — the boundary-reserved path): resilient HTTP core using cockatiel (community lib) — per-attempt timeout from Config (~5s), retry (5xx/timeout/network, NOT 4xx), circuit breaker; pure classifyError; centralized endpoints + pure Strapi->domain mappers (the adjustable layer); StrapiContentSource; composition-root factory (injectable fetch/clock/resilience). In-memory fake (web/src/lib/testing) proves swappability. Bearer-token passthrough wired in the HTTP core for future members/duty methods. VERIFIED: 52 tests pass; adapter coverage 92% (threshold 65%); typecheck 0 errors; lint clean; dependency-cruiser boundaries 0 errors; grep confirms no @strapi import in web/src. SCOPE: public-content reads implemented+tested; members/duty methods deferred to x60.10/.11 (port will extend; token mechanism ready). Endpoint apiIDs + field names centralized (endpoints.ts, mappers.ts) and marked to reconcile with CMS content-types (pgx.3-.8) as they finalize.

App shell + CMS-driven navigation. Root +layout.svelte: skip-to-content link, header/brand, accessible primary nav (native <details>/<summary> dropdowns for one-level nesting = keyboard+SR operable), mobile menu toggle (aria-expanded/aria-controls), active-state via aria-current + isActive(), footer shell (populated by x60.9). +layout.server.ts loads nav via ContentSource.getNavigation() using the request fetch; degrades gracefully — on CMS failure/empty it logs a structured warning and renders FALLBACK_NAV, never crashing. Pure, tested helpers in domain/navigation.ts (isActive, chooseNavigation, FALLBACK_NAV). Server wiring in lib/server/content.ts (config + factory). BUGFIX (incremental): made lib/server/config lazy/memoised (getConfig()) + moved eager validation to the server init hook, because the previous top-level loadConfig() broke 'npm run build' once config entered the build graph (no env at build). VERIFIED: typecheck 0 errors, lint clean (1 accepted max-lines warning on layout), 58 tests pass, coverage exit 0, production build succeeds, dependency-cruiser boundaries 0 errors. FOLLOW-UP: component-level a11y tests need @testing-library/svelte (not yet set up) — pure nav logic is covered; consider adding in x60.12.

Home page with Aktuelt takeover. +page.server.ts loads getActiveAktuelt + listUpcomingEvents + getSiteSettings via the ContentSource (each degrades independently — failures never crash the page). Pure selectHomeView() (domain/home.ts) decides takeover vs default; unit-tested (takeover when active Aktuelt present, else default). +page.svelte renders the takeover (title/image/body/CTA) or the default homepage (intro + upcoming events with Danish date formatting + empty state). DEFENSIVE BOUNDARY: added a shared server-side sanitizer (lib/server/sanitize.ts, sanitize-html) applied to CMS rich text (intro + aktuelt body) before {@html} — reused by static pages (x60.7). VERIFIED: typecheck 0 errors, lint clean (1 accepted max-lines warning), 60 tests pass, coverage exit 0, production build succeeds, dependency-cruiser boundaries 0 errors. NOTE: built against the stable ContentSource port + in-memory fake; LIVE integration against the real CMS (schema/field/endpoint reconciliation) is tracked in sgim-x60.14 — the real schemas diverge from the adapter's original assumptions.

CMS content types are now functional Strapi v5 APIs. Migrated all 6 (aktuelt, club, event, navigation, site-setting, static-page) from malformed src/content-types/*/schema.json to proper src/api/<singular>/{content-types/<singular>/schema.json (with info block), routes, controllers, services} via a repeatable script (cms/scripts/migrate-content-types.mjs). Cleaned auto fields (createdAt/updatedAt/createdBy/updatedBy/publishedAt) and dropped inverse oneToMany relations (kept owning manyToOne: event.category, static-page.parent). options.draftAndPublish=false (data immediately live). Fixed aktuelt singular==plural collision (plural -> aktuelts). Added public read permissions bootstrap (src/config/bootstrap-permissions.ts, wired into src/index.ts; idempotent). LIVE-VERIFIED against docker Postgres + strapi start: build registers all content types; GET /api/events, /api/clubs, /api/navigations, /api/static-pages -> HTTP 200 with correct {data,meta} envelopes; single types /api/site-setting & /api/aktuelt registered (return data:null/404 until an entry exists, as expected); bootstrap granted 10 public permissions. cms gates green (typecheck 0 errors, lint 0 errors, 23 tests). FOLLOW-UPS: (1) single types need seed entries to return data; (2) web adapter endpoints must be reconciled to real apiIDs (e.g. /api/events not /api/single-events) in sgim-x60.14 (now unblocked); (3) content agent's configureMemberAuth (pgx.9) logs a runtime bootstrap error 'strapi.service(...).create is not a function' — their area, flagging.

Adapter reconciled to the real CMS schemas + LIVE end-to-end verified. Reworked web adapter: domain SiteSettings -> real fields (siteName, siteDescription->intro, email/phone/address/footer/social); endpoints.ts -> real apiIDs (/api/events single collection, /api/site-setting, /api/aktuelt single-type, /api/navigations?filters[location]=header, /api/clubs, /api/static-pages); mapEvent maps eventType single-day|multi-day + combines date+time; mapAktuelt + isAktueltActive (enabled+window via Clock); mapNavItem derives href from slug; mapClub/mapStaticPage/mediaUrl reconciled. Updated fake + tests. VERIFIED: web typecheck 0, 67 tests, lint clean, boundaries 0, build ok. LIVE: seeded CMS (docker Postgres + strapi) + web (adapter-node) -> homepage renders real CMS content end-to-end (intro, CMS nav Hjem/Kalender/Klubber/Om os, upcoming events incl. multi-day date range) — Playwright screenshot confirms, matching sgim.dk's front page. REMAINING (own tasks): static-page route /om-os (x60.7), events pages (x60.6), clubs pages (x60.8) not built yet so those nav links 404; media URLs not absolutized (no images seeded) — prefix with CMS base URL when images are added.

Events pages built + live-verified. /kalender: upcoming events list (unified feed, ascending) showing date/range, title, speaker (v/ ...), location; multi-day events render as a date range (e.g. 26. oktober – 30. oktober). /kalender/[slug]: event detail with date/speaker/location + sanitised rich-text description; unknown slug -> 404, CMS failure -> 502. Shared Danish date formatter (/format.ts). Added event.slug to the domain model + speaker mapping (from CMS 'organizer', e.g. 'Kristian Lindholm, Regionsleder, Indre Mission') shown on home + list + detail per sgim.dk. LIVE: all pages HTTP 200 against seeded CMS; Playwright screenshots confirm. NOTE: month-grid calendar view not built — a chronological list is used (matches sgim.dk's front-page style); a grid can be added later if wanted.

Static pages built + live-verified. Dynamic /[slug] route: getStaticPageBySlug -> renders title, optional hero image, SEO meta description, and server-SANITISED rich-text body ({@html} of sanitize-html output). Unknown/unpublished slug -> 404; CMS failure -> 502. Specific routes (/kalender, /klubber) take precedence over the catch-all. LIVE: /om-os renders the seeded 'Om os' page (HTTP 200); /kalender/nope -> 404 verified.

Clubs pages built + live-verified. /klubber: ordered club list (name, age group, meeting schedule with Danish weekday translation e.g. Søndag 19:30) linking to detail. /klubber/[slug]: club detail with age group, meeting time, contact person + mailto, and sanitised rich-text description; unknown slug -> 404. LIVE: /klubber shows IMU/Juniorklub/Teenklub; /klubber/imu, /klubber/juniorklub -> HTTP 200. Verified end-to-end against seeded CMS. NOTE: per-club upcoming events (event.category relation) not yet wired — event.clubSlug is undefined until the relation is populated/mapped; small follow-up.

Footer from Site Settings. Root +layout.server.ts now loads getSiteSettings alongside navigation (parallel, graceful — null settings on failure). +layout.svelte footer renders org name, address, email (mailto), phone, Facebook/Instagram links (only when present), and copyright; degrades to a plain name line if settings unavailable. LIVE-VERIFIED: footer shows kontakt@sgim.dk, address, phone, social links, © from the seeded Site Settings (Playwright screenshot).

Member auth: login, httpOnly session, protected /members, logout. Built on Strapi default Users&Permissions (/api/auth/local); did not need pgx.9's custom role setup. LIVE-VERIFIED end-to-end (Playwright+curl): protected redirect, valid login sets httpOnly session -> Medlemsområde, wrong password -> generic error. Seeded member medlem@sgim.dk/Medlem1234 (provider=local fix).
Duty content types (duty-category, duty-assignment) as functional Strapi APIs + seed (6 roles x meetings = open slots). Live-verified.

Duty self-management API: custom claim/release (own-only), authenticated-role perms, custom find exposes member username. Verified live: claim 200, double-claim 409, release 200, unauth 403. Uses authenticated role (did not need pgx.9). Follow-up: DB-atomic claim + add/swap.

Members duty roster UI + claim/release. ContentSource duty methods (token passthrough), pure groupRoster, /members roster grouped by meeting with Tag tjansen/Frigiv; verified end-to-end via Playwright (claim shows 'medlem (dig)'). Gates green.
